_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-24 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1437.9 is above EMA18 (1416.5) and EMA50 (1368.04) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (27.63) is below its signal line (28.57) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1425.47) and resistance (1444.87) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -0.44%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
